svg.title: MedBuddy + Med-Overwatch — full solution flowchart (no phases, no WhatsApp)
svg.desc: Every module of the unified platform laid out in order: inputs, patient folder, AI brain extract, AI brain intelligence, submission, query loop, analytics and role surfaces, data flywheel.
svg.text: MedBuddy + Med-Overwatch — full solution (every module, no phases)
Read top to bottom. Light boxes = product modules. Outlined boxes = AI modules. Bold-outlined = the two new wedges from Blueprint v2 (Evidence Locator + Packet Builder).

g.text: Doctor/Nurse · QR-bound to patient at capture
Photos · handwritten case sheets · no gallery save
Pulls vitals · discharge · bill · UTR by MRN
Pulls claim status · query text · payment
Single source of truth · server-side dedupe with suffix
Always shown by primary PatientName_MRN string
HPE reports · OT notes · post-op photos · discharge
Bills · referral · consent · prior imaging · lab reports
Registration copy · query-response docs · clinical vitals
Per-document: type · MRN · procedure · date · page-level OCR
"Where is the HPE report?" → file path + page numbers

svg.text: D · AI brain — prevent & resolve queries

g.text: Locates docs · merges PDFs · generates cover page
Includes original query text · attached evidence index · doctor's note
Reusable for portal upload or NHCX submission
PMJAY · CGHS · ESI · Railway · ECHS · SHA

svg.text: F · Query loop — when an insurer raises a query
G · Analytics & role surfaces — one folder, four lenses

g.text: Review AI case sheet (Dx · ICD · Rx)
MedCam capture · attach · flag missing items
Revenue at risk (₹ locked in pending)
"Pre-attach chemo charts on all PMJAY claims this week"
Visible only with ≥25 hospitals on the network
Every upload · AI step · HIS pull · query · response
Maps to FHIR AuditEvent for NHCX
Image / PDF preview · OCR text panel

svg.text: H · Data flywheel — every query becomes training data
Retrained models feed every next case
I · Outcomes (the case for building this)

g.text: A · Inputs — three channels (mobile, HIS, web upload, scheme-portal sync). Everything lands in one Patient Folder named PatientName_MRN.
B · Patient folder & repository — stores every artefact + the Clinical Evidence Index (new). The index is what makes retrieval possible later.
C · AI brain · extract — turns raw inputs into structured fields: handwriting → case sheet, rename, OCR, compress, match, check.
D · AI brain · intelligence — uses the structured data to prevent and resolve queries (risk scorer, missing-doc, predictor, classifier, Evidence Locator, drafter, Packet Builder, network).
E · Submission — into NHCX (target) or scheme portals (today), with status webhook + UTR reconciliation.
F · Query loop — when a query arrives: classify → locate evidence → draft response → build packet → resubmit. The five-step loop replaces the manual ping-pong from the "Before" chart.
G · Role surfaces — same folder, four lenses: Doctor · Nurse · TPA clerk · CFO. Plus Admin, network intelligence, audit trail, viewer.
H · Data flywheel — every query/response logged → PII-stripped → augmented → retrains the AI brain. Outcomes (I) are the case for building it.
